If copycat saw a bad role (tanner or werewolf) in center, that means center had a werewolf or tanner. But if center had werewolf, then there is at least one werewolf. Who could be werewolf? Possibly Paul or Justin? But Justin says he was copycat, so he could become whatever he saw. If he saw a werewolf, he became werewolf. So Justin might be werewolf. But others doubt. However, Paul claims he is seer, but others doubt. But if Paul is seer, he would have looked at someone. He says he saw something? He says "I think I might be seer." But he also says "the robber is in the center." That seems odd. Many suspect Paul.
